skill-openclaw-bootstrap.description: Bootstrap a fresh OpenClaw environment and install the public core safely.

skill-openclaw-validate.description: Validate layout, security boundaries, and install readiness.

skill-openclaw-ops.description: Operational tasks for cron, systemd, backups, logs, and recovery.

skill-openclaw-security.description: Secrets hygiene, redaction, least privilege, and safety checks.

skill-openclaw-plugins.description: Plugin boundary management for private or optional feature packs.
